{{Quote|Hoba was referencing the long history of Republic instituted demilitarization of the Andoan people, which often led to bloody conflicts like the Battle of Raquish, and the Horos Spine Incident.|HoloNet News report|<ref name="HNN">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|45|news/13228_1.html|Ando, Sy Myrth Secede}}</ref>}}
The '''Battle of Raquish''' was the final engagement of the [[Andoan Wars/Legends|Andoan Wars]], fought between the two groups of [[Planet/Legends|planets]] known as the [[Spiverelda/Legends|Spiverelda]] and the [[Andoan Free Colonies/Legends|Andoan Free Colonies]]. Taking place in [[39 BBY/Legends|39 BBY]], it saw the military leader [[Trench/Legends|Trench]] employ ruthless tactics against the Free Colonies' forces in what became a [[Blood/Legends|bloody]] engagement.

Although the battle was a victory for the Spiverelda, in its aftermath the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] intervened in the conflict, separating the two sides and demilitarizing the [[Lambda sector/Legends|local sector]]. The outcome of the Battle of Raquish subsequently fueled anti-Republic sentiment in the [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] inhabitants of the world [[Ando/Legends|Ando]].

==Prelude==
The [[Andoan Wars/Legends|Andoan Wars]] were a conflict fought between the [[Spiverelda/Legends|Spiverelda]], the group of [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] [[Colonist/Legends|colonized]] by the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] [[Species/Legends|species]] and being under the influence of<ref name="EGTW" /> its [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], [[Ando/Legends|Ando]],<ref name="CSWE Ando">{{CSWECite|I|30|Ando}}</ref> against<ref name="EGTW" /> the fifteen Aqualish-settled planets known as the [[Andoan Free Colonies/Legends|Andoan Free Colonies]].<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|30|Andosha II}}</ref> The conflict began in [[57 BBY/Legends|57 BBY]] and saw engagements at the celestial bodies [[Battle of Arbular|Arbular]] and [[Battle of Horos|Horos]], in which Spiverelda forces under the [[Commanding officer/Legends|command]] of [[Harch/Legends|Harch]] military leader [[Trench/Legends|Trench]] defeated those of the Free Colonies.<ref name="EGTW" />

==The battle==
In [[39 BBY/Legends|39 BBY]], the two factions fought each other again at the Battle of Raquish,<ref name="EGTW" /> which shared its name with the [[Raquish system/Legends|Raquish system]].<ref name="EAOC" /> One factor leading to the confrontation was the attempts by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] to demilitarize the Aqualish.<ref name="HNN" /> At Raquish, the Spiverelda forces were once more led by Trench, who employed ruthless tactics.<ref name="EGTW" /> The battle was [[Blood/Legends|bloody]]<ref name="HNN" /> and saw the use of considerable firepower, and ultimately resulted in a victory for the Spiverelda and an end to the Andoan Wars.<ref name="EGTW" />

==Aftermath==
[[File:AdmiralTrench-EGTW.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Trench was radicalized by the outcome of the Battle of Raquish.]]
The Battle of Raquish convinced the Republic to intervene and separate both opposing sides. Consequently, the Free Colonies were spared and<ref name="EGTW" /> the [[Lambda sector/Legends|Lambda sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> was demilitarized.<ref name="EGTW" /> As part of the Republic's intervention, the Free Colonies' use of military forces was restricted through the signing of the [[Treaty of Raquish]].<ref name="Insider67">{{InsiderCite|67|CIS Shadowfeed Dispatch 14:4:12 Edition}}</ref>

Both the Aqualish of Ando and Trench were radicalized by witnessing their victory at Raquish essentially be turned into a defeat,<ref name="EGTW" /> with a busy roadway named the [[Raquish Thoroughfare]] being established in [[Quantill City]],<ref name="HNN" /> the largest [[City/Legends|city]]<ref name="CSWE Quantill">{{CSWECite|III|59|Quantill City}}</ref> and [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of Ando.<ref name="DC">''[[Dangerous Covenants]]''</ref> In [[23 BBY/Legends|13:2:28]], Ando eagerly [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|seceded]] from the Republic,<ref name="HNN" /> and, during the later [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Trench went on to serve the Republic's enemy in the conflict, the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="EGTW" /> The Battle of Raquish was noted by an issue of the [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition]] of the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] that reported on Ando's secession.<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Battle of Raquish was first mentioned in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 45|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #45'']], an issue of the [[HoloNet News (original website)|representation]] of the [[in-universe]] HoloNet News<ref name="HNN" /> that was written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]]<ref name="Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> and published by [[March 10]], [[2002]].<ref name="JCF">{{JCFCite|url=threads/5990764|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-03-10|time=7:24 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20201002154704/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764}}</ref>
